# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy_staging
  - deploy_production

variables:
  ARTIFACT_DIR: "build_output"
  CONFIG_DIR: "configs"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Building application binaries..."
    - mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
    - mkdir -p ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - echo "binary_content_v1.0" > ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app_binary
    - echo "lib_content" > ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/library.so
    - chmod +x ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app_binary
    - echo "database_host=db.example.com" > ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config
    - echo "database_port=5432" >> ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config
    - echo "log_level=INFO" >> ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config
    - echo "environment=production" > ${CONFIG_DIR}/env.config
    - echo "Build completed successfully"
    - ls -lah ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
    - ls -lah ${CONFIG_DIR}
  artifacts:
    name: "build-artifacts-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    expire_in: 30 days
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests

test_artifacts:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Testing artifacts from build job..."
    - ls -lah ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
    - ls -lah ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - test -f ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app_binary || exit 1
    - test -f ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/library.so || exit 1
    - test -f ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config || exit 1
    - test -f ${CONFIG_DIR}/env.config || exit 1
    - echo "Running binary tests..."
    - cat ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app_binary
    - echo "Validating configuration files..."
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config
    - echo "All tests passed"
  dependencies:
    - build
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy_staging
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - echo "Downloading artifacts from build job..."
    - ls -lah ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
    - ls -lah ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - echo "Installing binaries to staging server..."
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app_binary /tmp/staging_app_binary
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/library.so /tmp/staging_library.so
    - echo "Deploying configuration files..."
    - cp ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config /tmp/staging_app.config
    - cp ${CONFIG_DIR}/env.config /tmp/staging_env.config
    - sed -i 's/environment=production/environment=staging/' /tmp/staging_env.config
    - echo "Executing application on staging..."
    - cat /tmp/staging_app_binary
    - cat /tmp/staging_app.config
    - echo "Staging deployment completed successfully"
  dependencies:
    - build
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - develop
    - main

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy_production
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - echo "Downloading artifacts from build job..."
    - ls -lah ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
    - ls -lah ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - echo "Pre-deployment checks..."
    - test -f ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app_binary || exit 1
    - test -f ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config || exit 1
    - echo "Installing binaries to production server..."
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app_binary /tmp/prod_app_binary
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/library.so /tmp/prod_library.so
    - echo "Deploying configuration files..."
    - cp ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config /tmp/prod_app.config
    - cp ${CONFIG_DIR}/env.config /tmp/prod_env.config
    - echo "Executing application on production..."
    - cat /tmp/prod_app_binary
    - cat /tmp/prod_app.config
    - echo "Production deployment completed successfully"
    - echo "Application is now live!"
  dependencies:
    - build
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  when: manual
  only:
    - main

archive_artifacts:
  stage: deploy_production
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Creating archive of all build artifacts..."
    - apk add --no-cache tar gzip
    - tar -czf artifacts-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz ${ARTIFACT_DIR} ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - echo "Archive created successfully"
    - ls -lah artifacts-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz
  dependencies:
    - build
  artifacts:
    name: "archived-artifacts-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - "artifacts-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz"
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - main
